date: ca. third quarter of the 10th century
date_inferred: ca. third quarter of the 10th century
description: Fragment (lower left corner) of a medieval legal document including the names Aharon b. ʿAmram and the witnesses [...] ha-Kohen b. Saʿīd and [...] b. Yiṣḥaq. The first witness (and probably also the scribe) is probably Shelomo b. Saʿīd ha-Kohen with an embellishment spelling out יזכה לעד, known from several legal documents from the third quarter of the 10th century (including Bodl. MS heb. b 12/6 + Bodl. MS heb. b 12/29 (PGPID 6355), T-S 12.161 (PGPID 7164), and T-S 12.539 + T-S 16.66 (PGPID 16143)).
description_he: קטע מסמך משפטי מימי הביניים הכולל שמות אהרון בן עמרם ועדים; הסופר הוא כנראה שלמה בן סעיד הכהן, מהרבע השלישי של המאה ה-10
